calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2019 Continued To Oct-16-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2018 Continued To Apr-17-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Chiharu Sekino, Esq. 619-235-2416 of Shepherd Finkelman Miller & Shah LLP for Plaintiff.
Kayvan Iradjpanah, Esq. 310-712-7318 of Littler for Defendant DRYBAR HOLDINGS.

RULING - A R G U E D. Plaintiff Argued. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT DRYBAR HOLDINGS LLC'S SPECIAL DEMURRER TO ABATE PLAINTIFF ARACELY RODRIGUEZ'S COMPLAINT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO STAY ALL PROCEEDINGS RELATED TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendant Drybar Holdings LLC's demurrer to the all causes of action alleged in the complaint filed by plaintiff Aracely Rodriguez on grounds of another action pending is sustained without leave to amend and this case is stayed pending the conclusion of the Perera case pending in Los Angeles Superior Court or further order of this court. The claims alleged and the recovery sought in this case is identical to the claims alleged and recovery sought in Perera which was filed prior to the filing of this case. Per CCP 430.10(c) and the doctrine of exclusive concurrent jurisdiction, this case must be stayed pending the conclusion of Perera. The fact that some of the claims alleged in this case were not included in Perera until after the filing of this case does not support or require a different result.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
